oracle_provenance.notes: Engine-emitted, NOT externally cross-validated. The expected APR is the value produced by lib.apr.solve_apr at fixture-write time (CAPTURED_AT). Any drift >Decimal('0.00001') from the pinned value indicates an engine regression vs the snapshot. The autonomous-execution override accepted by the project owner permits this provenance class for the Phase 7 oracle corpus closure (see .planning/phases/07-estimated-apr/07-07-ffiec-fixtures-SUMMARY.md §Partial Closure).
